languages.text: {n}Это устройство изготовлено частным образом, что наверняка нарушает с десяток догматов {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g}. Его владелец чудовищно богат и одной ногой стоит вне закона.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Это устройство изготовлено частным образом, что наверняка нарушает с десяток догматов {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g}. Его владелец чудовищно богат и одной ногой стоит вне закона.{/n}

languages.text: {n}This device was made by private commission, surely violating about a dozen tenets of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Its owner is staggeringly rich and has one foot outside the law.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Это устройство изготовлено частным образом, что наверняка нарушает с десяток догматов {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g}. Его владелец чудовищно богат и одной ногой стоит вне закона.{/n}

{n}This device was made by private commission, surely violating about a dozen tenets of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Its owner is staggeringly rich and has one foot outside the law.{/n}

languages.text: {n}这台装置显然是私人定制的，想必已经违反了十几条{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}机械修会{/g}戒律。它的主人财大气粗，而且明显游走在法律边缘。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This device was made by private commission, surely violating about a dozen tenets of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Its owner is staggeringly rich and has one foot outside the law.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}这台装置显然是私人定制的，想必已经违反了十几条{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}机械修会{/g}戒律。它的主人财大气粗，而且明显游走在法律边缘。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Fabriqué sur commande privée, cet appareil doit transgresser une bonne douzaine des préceptes de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Son propriétaire est quelqu'un d'incroyablement riche qui trempe dans l'illégalité.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This device was made by private commission, surely violating about a dozen tenets of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Its owner is staggeringly rich and has one foot outside the law.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Fabriqué sur commande privée, cet appareil doit transgresser une bonne douzaine des préceptes de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Son propriétaire est quelqu'un d'incroyablement riche qui trempe dans l'illégalité.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bu cihaz, {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus'un{/g} yaklaşık on kadar ilkesini ihlal ederek özel bir komisyon tarafından yapılmış. Sahibi, şaşırtıcı derecede zengin ve yasaya uymayan işlerle meşgul.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This device was made by private commission, surely violating about a dozen tenets of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Its owner is staggeringly rich and has one foot outside the law.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Bu cihaz, {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus'un{/g} yaklaşık on kadar ilkesini ihlal ederek özel bir komisyon tarafından yapılmış. Sahibi, şaşırtıcı derecede zengin ve yasaya uymayan işlerle meşgul.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Este dispositivo se hizo por encargo, violando sin duda en el proceso una veintena de doctrinas del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Su dueño es increíblemente rico y tiene un pie fuera de la legalidad.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This device was made by private commission, surely violating about a dozen tenets of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Its owner is staggeringly rich and has one foot outside the law.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Este dispositivo se hizo por encargo, violando sin duda en el proceso una veintena de doctrinas del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Su dueño es increíblemente rico y tiene un pie fuera de la legalidad.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dieses Gerät wurde privat in Auftrag gegeben und verstößt vermutlich gegen ein Dutzend Gebote des {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Sein Benutzer ist ausgesprochen reich und steht mit einem Fuß außerhalb des Gesetzes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This device was made by private commission, surely violating about a dozen tenets of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Its owner is staggeringly rich and has one foot outside the law.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dieses Gerät wurde privat in Auftrag gegeben und verstößt vermutlich gegen ein Dutzend Gebote des {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Sein Benutzer ist ausgesprochen reich und steht mit einem Fuß außerhalb des Gesetzes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}この装置は、依頼を受けて作られたもので、{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}機械神殿{/g}の教義を少なくとも12つ破っている。所有者は莫大な富を有し、法律の境界を踏み越えている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This device was made by private commission, surely violating about a dozen tenets of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Its owner is staggeringly rich and has one foot outside the law.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}この装置は、依頼を受けて作られたもので、{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}機械神殿{/g}の教義を少なくとも12つ破っている。所有者は莫大な富を有し、法律の境界を踏み越えている。{/n}
